design_philosophy.core_loop: Navigate side-scrolling levels, defeat enemies through combat and platforming, face level-ending bosses
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Precision platforming combined with combat encounters; managing health and ninja tools across challenging enemy gauntlets
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Embody a skilled ninja warrior seeking revenge, using martial arts and special techniques against overwhelming odds
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Action-heavy platformer that emphasizes combat flow over pure platforming; ninja protagonist with special abilities rather than generic hero archetype

difficulty.continues_system: Continue system present, allowing players to retry from checkpoints after game over
difficulty.checkpointing: Checkpoint system within levels; continues restart at stage beginnings
difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Limited agency; fixed difficulty curve with no adjustable difficulty settings documented

progression.upgrade_system: Special ninja abilities and tools (shuriken variants, kunai, other weapons) unlocked or obtained through progression
progression.unlock_mechanism: Story progression through level completion; weapons gained as drops or stage rewards
replayability_hooks: Challenge to beat high difficulty with limited lives
Different weapon loadouts alter level strategy
Speed-run potential through mastery of enemy patterns

world_building_techniques: Stage theming reflecting ninja revenge narrative (urban, industrial, mystical locations)
Implied antagonist and conflict through level progression structure

boss_design.philosophy: Pattern-based skill tests; each boss represents a significant combat encounter requiring mastery of the protagonist's combat toolkit
notable_bosses: Level-end boss encounters featuring distinct attack patterns
Multiple phases suggested by difficulty progression structure

faction_indicators: Ninja protagonist vs. implied antagonistic forces
danger_signals: Combat-focused gameplay with challenging enemy encounters
environmental_storytelling: Enemy placement and boss encounters reinforce narrative tension
